title: Wynn: The Autumnal Canyon
description: Turn TCC into an Autumn Paradise
body:
# The Autumnal Canyon
This resource pack is intended to be used on Wynncraft's Raid The Canyon Colossus. Equiped with gorgeous autumn leaves, custom rocky textures, and even a few model changes you can turn the canyon into an autumn paradise.

This resource pack may be used elsewhere, but please note that some blocks may look out of place due to the texture changes.

-----

## Author's Note:
Do not backport the 1.21.11 version to earlier minecraft versions, as the model changes will break the visuals. use the 1.21.4 version if you are playing earlier than 1.21.11.
